channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Holds Iran Deal Meeting as US Stops Another Blockade Runner
item.description: President Trump met with top aides in the White House Situation Room to decide on extending the Iran ceasefire, while US Central Command reported stopping a Gambian-flagged cargo ship attempting to breach the Iranian port blockade—the sixth ship interdicted since April.

item.title: ⚔️ US Warns It Can Resume Iran War as Hegseth Addresses Asia Summit
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said the US is "more than capable" of restarting military operations against Iran during the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore, as negotiations over a ceasefire extension and Iran's nuclear program continue amid mutual accusations of violations.

item.title: 🇷🇴 Russian Drone Hits Romanian Apartment Building, Injuring Two
item.description: A Russian Geran-2 drone struck a residential building in the Romanian city of Galati near the Ukrainian border, injuring a woman and teenager—marking the most serious NATO territory incident since the Ukraine war began, though allies stopped short of invoking collective defense.

item.title: 🇦🇺 AUKUS Partners Announce Underwater Drone Technology Project
item.description: The US, UK and Australia unveiled a new uncrewed underwater vehicle project to protect undersea cables and enhance naval defense, with the UK contributing £150 million—the first major deliverable under AUKUS Pillar Two as the alliance seeks to counter Chinese maritime expansion.

item.title: 🇨🇩 Ebola Outbreak in Congo Reaches Over 1,000 Cases, WHO Chief Visits
item.description: The rare Bundibugyo Ebola strain has spread to over 1,000 suspected cases with at least 246 deaths in DR Congo, prompting WHO Director-General Tedros to visit Bunia as MSF warns the response has not kept pace with one of the fastest-spreading outbreaks on record.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Trump Roils Waters on Taiwan Independence After Beijing Summit
item.description: President Trump's comments after his meeting with Xi Jinping have created uncertainty about US policy on Taiwan, with implications for cross-strait relations and regional security.

item.title: 🇨🇺 US General Holds Rare Meeting With Cuban Military Officials Near Guantanamo
item.description: A US general conducted an unusual meeting with Cuban military officials near Guantanamo Bay, a rare instance of direct military-to-military engagement between the two nations.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Ousted Turkish Opposition Leader Draws Thousands in Ankara Protest
item.description: Thousands gathered in Ankara to support the ousted opposition leader, in a show of political tension in Turkey.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Broadens Digital Yuan Footprint From Lottery to Fiscal Spending
item.description: China is incentivizing banks to boost digital yuan use in trade and fiscal spending as it expands the rollout of its central bank digital currency.

item.title: 🇨🇩 WHO Chief Rallies Community for Congo Ebola Response
item.description: WHO Director-General Tedros visited eastern Congo to oversee Ebola containment efforts as the outbreak spreads rapidly.

item.title: 🇿🇲 Zambia Steps Up Ebola Screening After Suspected Cases Test Negative
item.description: Zambia enhanced screening measures after two suspected Ebola cases tested negative, amid regional concerns about the outbreak.

item.title: 🇨🇴 Colombia Accuses Ecuador of Deliberate Interference in Presidential Election
item.description: Colombia's foreign ministry accused Ecuador's president of meddling after he promised to lift tariffs for a right-wing presidential candidate ahead of Sunday's election.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkey Sees Strong Potential for Drone Development With Japan
item.description: Turkey is exploring drone development cooperation with Japan as it expands its defense industry partnerships.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Hegseth Letter Details Ukraine Policy
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's letter provides details on US policy toward Ukraine amid ongoing war with Russia.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Military Turns Away Blockade Runner Trying to Reach Iranian Port
item.description: US Central Command reported stopping a vessel attempting to breach the naval blockade of Iranian ports.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Recalls Envoy From Armenia Over EU Ties
item.description: Russia recalled its ambassador from Armenia amid tensions over Yerevan's closer ties with the European Union ahead of a crucial vote.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines Remains Under Threat From China Despite Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: The Philippines continues to face threats from China in the South China Sea despite the recent Trump-Xi summit, according to the defense minister.

item.title: 🇲🇲 Myanmar's Junta Chief Heads to India With Eye on China
item.description: Myanmar's military leader visited India as he balances relationships between major powers amid ongoing conflict at home.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Pentagon Chief Urges Allies to Boost Defense Spending Amid Alarm Over China
item.description: Defense Secretary Hegseth called on allies to increase defense spending at the Shangri-La Dialogue, citing concerns about China's military buildup.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China and Japan's Rare Earth Trade Goes Quiet
item.description: Trade tensions between China and Japan are affecting the critical rare earth minerals supply chain.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russian Region Creates New Drone Defense Ministry
item.description: A Russian region established a new ministry focused on drone defense as Ukrainian strikes change the dynamics of the war.

item.title: 🇪🇪 Estonia Installs Stationary Drone Detection Systems on Russian Border
item.description: Estonia has deployed fixed drone detection systems along its border with Russia, enhancing NATO's eastern flank defenses.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinese Scientists Develop "Kill Them All" Algorithm for Drone Warfare
item.description: Chinese researchers have created an algorithm designed to coordinate drone swarms in combat scenarios.
